qualitative_claim: Low volume at a meaningful extreme marks exhausted aggressors only when location is clean.
bullish_rule: At LOD/swing low/support/value edge, low edge volume at bar low; long after closed-bar confirmation and trigger.
bearish_rule: At HOD/swing high/resistance/value edge, low edge volume at bar high; short after closed-bar confirmation and trigger.
feature_columns_needed: edge_volume_low; edge_volume_high; edge_volume_percentile; edge_level_type; swing_extreme_rank; session_extreme_flag; state
candidate_thresholds: Instrument/timeframe scaled ExpVol; test dynamic percentile and examples: ES around 0, NQ around 3, 10yr around 50; do not globalize 10.
confirmation_rule: Closed bar plus next-bar trigger or timeframe-appropriate confirmation.
invalidation_rule: Signal extreme breached/accepted; no response by freshness window.
expected_edge: High if edge is clean and stop is tight.
source_support: Both; Claude full corpus refines thresholds
notes: First backtest. Codex structure retained; Claude threshold scaling wins.

qualitative_claim: The flagship A+ is absorbed aggression followed by exhaustion at the edge.
bullish_rule: Sellers absorbed near low, hidden flip or negative delta green/off-low, then exhaustion/rejection; long.
bearish_rule: Buyers absorbed near high, hidden flip or positive delta red/off-high, then exhaustion/rejection; short.
required_data: OHLCV; footprint; bar delta; MaxSeenDelta; MinSeenDelta; levels
feature_columns_needed: absorption_score; effort_result_score; DeltaGiveBackPct; exhaustion_flag; edge_level_type; next_bar_trigger
candidate_thresholds: No hard absorption threshold; use soft score. Exhaustion threshold scaled by instrument.
confirmation_rule: Bar close and price moves away from absorbed/exhaustion zone.
invalidation_rule: Price accepts through absorbed zone; fresh initiative expands through edge.
expected_edge: Very high; tight stop plus confluence.
notes: Do not require absorption before every exhaustion signal; compare pure exhaustion vs absorption overlay.

qualitative_claim: Close delta can mislead; Max/Min delta give-back reveals hidden absorption/exhaustion.
bullish_rule: At low, large negative MinSeenDelta gives back toward zero/positive close delta; long after price holds/lifts.
bearish_rule: At high, large positive MaxSeenDelta gives back toward zero/negative close delta; short after rejection.
required_data: OHLCV; bid/ask delta path; MaxSeenDelta; MinSeenDelta; BarDelta
feature_columns_needed: MaxSeenDelta; MinSeenDelta; BarDelta; DeltaGiveBackPct; close_location_value; edge_level_type
candidate_thresholds: Keep give-back percentage soft; examples 80-96% are not production thresholds.
confirmation_rule: Closed bar finalizes Max/Min; trigger requires level and price response.
invalidation_rule: Delta re-accelerates in original direction; price accepts through edge.
expected_edge: High; likely core improvement over close-delta-only logic.
notes: Promote to first-build if Max/Min delta is available.

qualitative_claim: Follow-through is a load-bearing quality filter, but only on appropriate chart speeds.
bullish_rule: For fast charts, long signal should trade above signal/trigger within 1-2 bars.
bearish_rule: For fast charts, short signal should trade below signal/trigger within 1-2 bars.
candidate_thresholds: Test 1-2 ticks and 1-2 bars; disable/relax on >=5-min and slow instruments.
confirmation_rule: Fast-chart next 1-2 bars; slow-chart order-flow confirmation instead.
invalidation_rule: No follow-through; opposite signal; acceptance through edge.
expected_edge: Cuts low-quality signals; expected cull 25-45% descriptive, not target.
notes: Do not force follow-through on >=5-min charts.

qualitative_claim: Aggressive effort without price result is absorption/failure.
bullish_rule: High sell effort at support/low with poor downside progress and off-low/green close; long.
bearish_rule: High buy effort at resistance/high with poor upside progress and off-high/red close; short.
candidate_thresholds: Use normalized delta/volume percentiles; no absolute global delta.
confirmation_rule: Price rotates away or retest fails.
invalidation_rule: Aggressive side finally gets continuation.
expected_edge: Strong but measurement is inferred without DOM.
notes: Keep graded. Do not create absorption boolean from one candle.

qualitative_claim: Strong positive delta at highs is bearish when buyers fail to continue.
bullish_rule: Mirror only if strong negative delta fails at low.
bearish_rule: At HOD/swing high/resistance, positive delta high percentile but no upside progress; short on rejection/loss of signal low.
candidate_thresholds: Percentile threshold 80/90 for tests; never delta sign alone.
confirmation_rule: No continuation plus rejection/negative response.
invalidation_rule: Price accepts higher and delta remains strong.
expected_edge: High at clean resistance; bad in open trend continuation.
notes: Pair with sequencing suppressor.

qualitative_claim: Strong negative delta at lows is bullish only if sellers are absorbed.
bullish_rule: At LOD/swing low/support, negative delta high percentile but price holds/off-low or green; long.
bearish_rule: Mirror handled by F06.
candidate_thresholds: Percentile/z-score normalized by instrument/session.
confirmation_rule: Closed bar holds low, next bar lifts or reclaim fires.
invalidation_rule: Price accepts lower and selling continues.
expected_edge: High with clean support and hidden flip.
notes: Add bid/offer disambiguation at the extreme if available.

qualitative_claim: Breakouts/sweeps reverse when price cannot accept outside the level.
bullish_rule: Break below support/LOD/value then close/reclaim back above; long.
bearish_rule: Break above resistance/HOD/value then close/reject back below; short.
feature_columns_needed: broken_level_type; break_distance_ticks; bars_outside_level; reclaim_flag; reclaim_speed; post_reclaim_mfe
candidate_thresholds: Reclaim 1-3 bars is a fast-chart start; relax by timeframe.
confirmation_rule: Close back inside plus next-bar hold/move away.
invalidation_rule: Retest outside holds; trend accepts beyond level.
notes: More testable than trapped/stop-run naming.

qualitative_claim: Multiple imbalances can fire earlier and rank equal/above stacked; failure at edge is reversal evidence.
bullish_rule: Sell multiple/stack into low fails and zone is reclaimed; long.
bearish_rule: Buy multiple/stack into high fails and zone is lost; short.
required_data: Footprint bid/ask; imbalance engine; OHLC; levels
candidate_thresholds: 3+ generally, 2 on fast charts; test ratio/min-volume grids.
confirmation_rule: No continuation and reclaim/loss of imbalance zone.
invalidation_rule: Continuation in imbalance direction; opposite ratio/signal can void.
source_support: Claude full corpus; Codex supports imbalance failure
notes: Do not weight position-in-bar. Downgrade low cell-volume stacks.

qualitative_claim: Delta polarity must be interpreted by location and bid/offer volume at the extreme.
bullish_rule: At low, positive delta is not automatically bullish; require bid-side absorption/holding or hidden flip.
bearish_rule: At high, negative delta is not automatically bearish; require offer-side absorption/rejection or hidden flip.
required_data: Footprint per-level bid/ask; bar delta; Max/Min delta; levels
feature_columns_needed: DeltaSignContext; BidAskAtExtreme; BarDelta; MaxSeenDelta; MinSeenDelta; edge_level_type
candidate_thresholds: No fixed threshold; branch logic before scoring.
confirmation_rule: Context branch agrees with price response.
invalidation_rule: Wrong-side bid/offer dominance signals continuation, suppressing reversal.
notes: Critical if per-level bid/ask at extreme is available.

qualitative_claim: Escalating volume eaten through successive levels is continuation, not reversal.
bullish_rule: Suppress longs against downside sequencing unless failed acceptance appears.
bearish_rule: Suppress shorts against upside sequencing unless failed acceptance appears.
required_data: Footprint volume by price; OHLC; delta optional
candidate_thresholds: No hard count yet; test consecutive levels/bars and volume progression.
confirmation_rule: Suppress/cap countertrend signal rather than create reversal entry.
invalidation_rule: Sequencing continues through level.
notes: Add after baseline signals so filter impact is measurable.

qualitative_claim: Ratio is a binary/two-tier soft flag, not stronger because magnitude is larger.
bullish_rule: Bullish ratio/divergence at low supports long only with location and confirmation.
bearish_rule: Bearish ratio/divergence at high supports short only with location and confirmation.
candidate_thresholds: High watch 28/preferred 30; low around 0.69/0.7699; formula undisclosed; platform-calibrated.
confirmation_rule: Ratio flag plus price confirmation.
invalidation_rule: Opposite next-bar ratio can void thesis.
notes: Do not implement until formula is reproduced/validated.

qualitative_claim: Zero or near-zero delta is noise, not a reversal signal.
bullish_rule: Do not use near-zero delta as bullish evidence.
bearish_rule: Do not use near-zero delta as bearish evidence.
candidate_thresholds: Neutral bands are instrument/session scaled: examples +/-25 FX, +/-150 heavy ES.
confirmation_rule: Suppress or neutralize delta-only modules.
invalidation_rule: None; filter only.
notes: Easy filter; do not over-broaden neutral band.

qualitative_claim: Oversized signal bars damage stop feasibility and A+ quality.
bullish_rule: Cap/downscore long if signal range or stop is too large.
bearish_rule: Cap/downscore short if signal range or stop is too large.
candidate_thresholds: Test range percentile 75/85 and instrument max stop ticks.
confirmation_rule: Signal can still exist but grade capped.
invalidation_rule: Stop too wide, R too poor.
notes: Keep as cap, not signal.

qualitative_claim: POC/value areas not retraded next bar or abandoned can act as high-confidence context.
bullish_rule: Bullish when lower value/POC fails to attract trade and price lifts from support context.
bearish_rule: Bearish when upper value/POC fails to attract trade and price rejects from resistance context.
required_data: Footprint/volume profile; POC; value area; OHLC
candidate_thresholds: Binary next-bar intersection is cleaner than subjective POC prominence.
confirmation_rule: Next bar fails to retrade VA/POC and price moves away.
invalidation_rule: Price trades back into and accepts value/POC.
source_support: Claude full corpus; Codex noted POC/value context
notes: Build after core footprint signal.

qualitative_claim: 2+ consecutive same-price POCs create magnet/support/resistance; trade return after price leaves.
bullish_rule: After price leaves B2B POC, return to level rejects upward; long.
bearish_rule: After price leaves B2B POC, return to level rejects downward; short.
candidate_thresholds: 2+ exact consecutive POC prices; stop a few ticks beyond; validate by market.
confirmation_rule: Trade return/rejection, not while price sits at level.
invalidation_rule: Level fails and price accepts through.
notes: Optional later module.

qualitative_claim: Order-flow signals decay; timeout must scale by chart speed.
bullish_rule: Long signal downgraded/exited if no appropriate MFE before freshness window.
bearish_rule: Short signal downgraded/exited if no appropriate MFE before freshness window.
required_data: OHLC; time; bar type; signal state
candidate_thresholds: Fast charts 5-10 min; slow charts/instruments 30-60 min; not global.
confirmation_rule: Early response appropriate to timeframe.
invalidation_rule: No response, opposite signal, or stale order-flow info.
notes: Separate entry edge from management edge.

qualitative_claim: A+ is confluence with hard caps, not sum of random plots.
bullish_rule: Long score >= threshold with location, failure, confirmation, risk, and no caps.
bearish_rule: Short score >= threshold with location, failure, confirmation, risk, and no caps.
feature_columns_needed: location_score; failure_score; confirmation_score; risk_score; timing_score; hard_cap_reason
candidate_thresholds: A+ around 82 research start; must validate out-of-sample.
confirmation_rule: Confirmed/triggered state and no hard caps.
invalidation_rule: Any hard cap; acceptance; stale/no response.
notes: Do not let score hide weak submodules; export components.

qualitative_claim: Repeated failed divergences/flow-driven regime should be followed or suppress fades.
bullish_rule: If repeated bearish divergences fail and price breaks higher, suppress shorts or allow breakout logic.
bearish_rule: If repeated bullish divergences fail and price breaks lower, suppress longs or allow breakdown logic.
required_data: OHLC; cumulative delta; divergence history; levels
candidate_thresholds: Count/window not fixed; test 2-3 failures in 30-60 min.
confirmation_rule: Breakout acceptance after failed divergences.
invalidation_rule: Divergence finally works; breakout fails.
notes: Filter first; entry later if proven.

qualitative_claim: Volume distribution inside value is orthogonal confirmation, not delta.
bullish_rule: Bullish only if volume-in-value skew supports long and core setup exists.
bearish_rule: Bearish only if volume-in-value skew supports short and core setup exists.
candidate_thresholds: No hard threshold; optional score +0.5 style confirmation.
confirmation_rule: Only after core signal confirms.
invalidation_rule: Core signal invalidates; Stratum alone ignored.
notes: Do not mechanically stack.

qualitative_claim: One stop-out does not always invalidate if order-flow thesis remains intact.
bullish_rule: After long stop-out, permit one re-entry only after reclaim and unchanged thesis.
bearish_rule: After short stop-out, permit one re-entry only after rejection and unchanged thesis.
candidate_thresholds: Cap one re-entry; no default threshold.
confirmation_rule: Fresh confirmation after stop-out.
invalidation_rule: Fresh continuation invalidates thesis.
expected_edge: Uncertain; can improve clipped trades or encode revenge.
notes: Defer until base entries are validated.

qualitative_claim: Candle color agreement helps but should be a toggle/manual overlay, not universal rule.
bullish_rule: Green/off-low improves long but is not mandatory if hidden flip/absorption is strong.
bearish_rule: Red/off-high improves short but is not mandatory if hidden flip/absorption is strong.
candidate_thresholds: Default ON for fast charts, toggle off/soft for other contexts.
confirmation_rule: Use as score/cap, not hard universal gate.
invalidation_rule: Wrong color plus no other confirmation weakens trade.
notes: Good visual filter, not primary edge.
